description: Broadcast for one row fails on attempts 1 and 2, succeeds on attempt 3. handleBroadcast's internal retry envelope absorbs the transient failure; the module never sees an error. Final state: 1 forwarded, 0 dead_lettered, 0 failed. Verifies the module composes with handleBroadcast's retry semantics (does not redundantly retry, does not escalate transient errors to DLQ).
